landing.title: Auth Test Console
landing.description: Clean testing page for authentication status, role, and verification state.
landing.verifyEmailDescription: Sign-in is allowed, but verification is still recommended for account security.

signIn.title: Sign in
signIn.description: Enter your credentials to access your account

signUp.title: Create an account
signUp.description: Enter your details to create a new account

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDescription: We have sent a password reset link to your email address.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.invalidTokenDescription: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor verification
twoFactor.description: Enter a code from your authenticator app or use a backup code.
twoFactor.differentAccount: Need to use a different account?

verificationSent.title: Check your email
verificationSent.description: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and click the link to verify your account.
verificationSent.didntReceive: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder or

verifyEmail.title: Verify Email
verifyEmail.description: Verify your email address to complete your account setup.
verifyEmail.verifyingDescription: Please wait while we verify your email address...

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View your dashboard and account overview

account.notSignedInDescription: Please sign in to view your account settings.
account.couldNotCopy: Could not copy backup codes. Please copy them manually.

profileInfo.title: Profile Information
profileInfo.description: View and manage your account details

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.description: Update your password to keep your account secure

twoFactorSection.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorSection.description: Add an extra layer of security to your account
twoFactorSection.enableDescription: When enabled, you'll be required to enter a verification code from your authenticator app in addition to your password.

passkeysSection.title: Passkeys
passkeysSection.description: Manage your passkeys for passwordless authentication
passkeysSection.subtitle: Passkey Authentication
passkeysSection.usePasskeys: Use passkeys to sign in without a password

twoFactorSetup.dialogDescription: Scan this QR code in your authenticator app, then save your backup codes before continuing.
twoFactorSetup.totpError: TOTP URI was not returned. Try enabling 2FA again.
twoFactorSetup.scanHint: If scanning fails, copy this secret URI manually into your app.
twoFactorSetup.savedCodes: I saved my backup codes in a safe place.
twoFactorSetup.regenerateHint: You can regenerate backup codes later from account settings.

validation.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.nameMaxLength: Name must be less than 100 characters
validation.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
validation.passwordMaxLength: Password must be less than 128 characters
validation.newPasswordDifferent: New password must be different from current password
